OmniUiCard.description: To Display Inspection Assessment Indicator as related list under Inspection record Detail Page.
OmniUiCard.name: PHOCSDisplayInspectionAssessmentIndRelatedList
OmniUiCard.propertySetConfig:

OmniUiCard.sampleDataSourceResponse: {"result":[{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Does the Water Supplier hold a valid Operating Permit?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Operations","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j3ZQAQ"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Has the annual fee as set out in Schedule C been paid?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Operations","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j3aQAA"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Is the water supply system going to be operated for more than 14 days in a fiscal year?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Operations","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j3bQAA"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Is there a decal on the operating permit?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Operations","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j3cQAA"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Is the water supplier operating the water supply system in according with applicable regulations?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Operations","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j3dQAA"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Was the water supply system operated according to the terms of the operating permit?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Operations","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j3eQAA"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Does the Water Supplier have a written emergency response plan and contingency plan?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Emergency Response","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j3fQAA"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Has a DWO ordered a review and update of the ERCP? If yes, has the ERCP been completed?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Emergency Response","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j3gQAA"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Does the ERCP have the name and phone number for: management personal; DWO, MHO and EHO; and other agencies and officials specified by the DWO?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Emergency Response","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j3hQAA"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Is there a list of who to contact during each type of emergency or abnormal operational circumstance?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Emergency Response","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j3iQAA"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Are there steps for the water supplier to follow for each type of emergency or abnormal circumatance?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Emergency Response","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j3jQAA"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"When an immediate reporting standard is not met, is there a protocol for the water supplier to follow on how to notify the public?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Emergency Response","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j3kQAA"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Did the water supplier make the ERCP accessible to staff?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Emergency Response","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j3lQAA"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Did the water supplier provide the ERCP to the DWO?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Emergency Response","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j3mQAA"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Is a summary of the emergency response and contingency plan available to users of the system?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Emergency Response","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j3nQAA"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Does the summary emergency response and contingency plan include any information which may pose a risk to the water supply system?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Emergency Response","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j3oQAA"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Is the water supply system being operated, maintained, or repaired by a qualified person?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - EOCP","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j3pQAA"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Is all the maintenance or repair being conducted by a qualified operator for the treatment classification?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - EOCP","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j3qQAA"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Is the maintenance or repair being supervised by a certified operator for the treatment classification of the system?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - EOCP","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j3rQAA"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Does this system have at least one person certified to operate the system at the level the system has been classified at by EOCP, subject to subsections of DWPR Section 12?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - EOCP","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j3sQAA"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Has the water supplier identified a threat (i.e. a condition or thing, or circumstance which may result in non-potable water)?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Incident Response Monitoring & Reporting","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j3tQAA"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"If yes, was the DWO immediately notified of the threat?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Incident Response Monitoring & Reporting","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j3uQAA"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Was a written notification of a threat provided within 24 hours to each person required: DWO, MHO AND/OR EHO?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Incident Response Monitoring & Reporting","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j3vQAA"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Has the water supplier notified the public of a threat or hazard to water quality?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Incident Response Public Notification","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j3wQAA"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Is the water supplier the owner of a public premises served by a domestic water system where a threat, reporting standard or failure has been identified?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Incident Response Public Notification","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j3xQAA"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Has the owner posted a notice at each sink and drinking water fountain accessible to the public?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Incident Response Public Notification","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j3yQAA"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Has the water supplier made public its emergency response and contingency plan?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Incident Response Public Notification","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j3zQAA"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Has the water supplier made public the results of monitoring required by the regulations, its operating permit or the DWO, subject to any applicable time limits?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Incident Response Public Notification","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j40QAA"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Did the DWO order the water supplier to complete an assessment under section 18?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Incident Response Public Notification","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j41QAA"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"If yes, has the current assessment been made public?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Incident Response Public Notification","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j42QAA"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Did the DWO order the water supplier to prepare an assessment response plan?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Incident Response Public Notification","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j43QAA"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"If yes, has the assessment response plan been made public?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Incident Response Public Notification","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j44QAA"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Did the DWO require the water supplier to make any other information public?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Incident Response Public Notification","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j45QAA"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"If yes, have the other information made public?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Incident Response Public Notification","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j46QAA"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Has the water supplier made public the results of monitoring required by the regulation, operating permit or DWO within 6 months of the calendar year?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Incident Response Public Notification","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j47QAA"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Is the Water Supplier monitoring its source water and the drinking water it provides for the parameters, and at the frequency and by its operating permit?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Monitoring & Reporting","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j48QAA"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Has the sampling required for monitoring under Section 11(1)(a) been carried out in accordance with the regulations and the directions of the DWO?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Monitoring & Reporting","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j49QAA"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Is the Water Supplier transporting samples to a lab in accordance with procedures established by DWO?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Monitoring & Reporting","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j4AQAQ"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Is the water supplier monitoring the drinking water supplies for total coliform and Escherichia coli?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Monitoring & Reporting","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j4BQAQ"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Is the water supplier monitoring the drinking water supplies in the frequency set out in Schedule B?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Monitoring & Reporting","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j4CQAQ"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Did the water supplier notify the DWO that they recieved notice of a failure to meet an immediate reporting standard?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Incident Response Public Notificaiton","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j4DQAQ"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Were reasonable steps taken to notify of failure of immediate reporting standard directly or by phone to persons required to be notified, a person designated or person answering the phone designated for this purpose?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Incident Response Public Notificaiton","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j4EQAQ"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Was written notification provided within 24 hours to each person required under DWPA 12(3)(a)?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Incident Respomnse Public Notificaiton","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j4FQAQ"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Was construction, installation, alteration or extension of a water supply system undertaken as per construction permit?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Permitting","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j4GQAQ"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Was construction of the water supply system carried out in accordance with the terms of the permit and regulation?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Permitting","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j4HQAQ"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Did the DWO require the construction permit applicant to complete a drinking water analysis?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Permitting","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j4IQAQ"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Was the drinking water analysis recieved by the DWO as requested?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Permitting","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j4JQAQ"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Has the owner or operator of a drinking water well at risk of flooding flood-proofed the well in accordance with the DWPR and the Ground Water Protection Regulation?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Source Protection","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j4KQAQ"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Does the DWO consider the water to be potable?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Treatment","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j4LQAQ"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Are any additional requirements established by the regulation or operating permit being met?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Treatment","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j4MQAQ"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Does the water system provide drinking water from a surface water source?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Treatment","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j4NQAQ"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Is this surface water being disinfected to meet the Drinking Water Treatment Objectives (Microbial) for Surface Water?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Treatment","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j4OQAQ"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Does the water system provide drinking water from groundwater at risk of containing pathogens?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Treatment","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j4PQAQ"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Is this groundwater being disinfected to meet the Drinking Water Treatment Objectives (Microbial) for Groundwater?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Treatment","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j4QQAQ"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Has an assessment been required by regulations or ordered by the DWO?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Water Source and System Assessments","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j4RQAQ"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Did the assessment meet the requirements of the order?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Water Source and System Assessments","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j4SQAQ"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Has the assessment been filed with the DWO?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Water Source and System Assessments","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j4TQAQ"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Did the water supplier give advance notice to the public of their need to prepare an assessment as per DWO direction?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Water Source and System Assessments","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j4UQAQ"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Has an assessment response plan or its revision been ordered by the DWO to be completed by the water system suppler?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Water Source and System Assessments","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j4VQAQ"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"The directions of the drinking water officer and the regulation?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Water Source and System Assessments","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j4WQAQ"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Does the assessment response plan include identifying, eliminating and preventing cross-connections with non-potable water sources?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Water Source and System Assessments","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j4XQAQ"},{"Result":null,"TextFieldResponse":null,"AssessmentIndDefinitionName":"Does the assessment response plan include identifying, eliminating and preventing cross-connections with non-potable water sources?","AssessmentIndDefinitionCategory":"Drinking Water - Water Source and System Assessments","Id":"0ftbZ0000000j4YQAQ"}],"error":"OK"}
